name: Skiing & Snowboarding
description: Ride expansive, sunlit slopes with panoramic alpine views, perfect for both beginners and advanced riders.

name: La Folie Douce (Slope-Side Experience)
description: A high-energy alpine venue combining live music, performances, and an unforgettable atmosphere right on the mountain.

name: Dog Sledding
description: Glide through snowy alpine landscapes guided by a team of huskies for a peaceful, immersive winter experience.

name: Jet Skiing
description: Experience the open Mediterranean with high-speed rides along the iconic Riviera coastline, surrounded by crystal-clear waters and luxury yachts.

name: Le Club 55
description: Relax in an upscale beachfront setting known for its signature blend of music, dining, and high-end ambiance.

name: Shopping at Place des Lices
description: Browse a mix of designer boutiques and local markets in one of the most stylish squares in the South of France.

name: World-Famous Nightlife
description: Immerse yourself in globally renowned nightlife, featuring top DJs, iconic venues, and an unmatched late-night energy.

name: Boat Trips to Formentera
description: Set out across the Mediterranean to the nearby island of Formentera, known for its crystal-clear waters, white sand beaches, and laid-back atmosphere. This scenic escape offers a refreshing contrast to Ibiza’s energy, with breathtaking coastal views along the way.

name: Beach Club - Zazú
description: Located in Playa d’en Bossa, Zazú Ibiza blends beachfront relaxation with an immersive dinner and nightlife experience. By day, it offers a laid-back coastal atmosphere, while at night it transforms with live performances, DJs, and vibrant energy in a stylish, jungle-inspired setting.
